ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "city_tier" TEXT /* City tier of the customer's location (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2) */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Customer's preferred product category */,
  "loyalty_tier" TEXT /* Customer's loyalty tier (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is currently active (1 for active, 0 for inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent in the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal, Direct Debit) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the transaction */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item purchased */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Price of the item after any discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is featured (1 for featured, 0 for not featured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer participating in the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer in the program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer enrolled in the loyalty program */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the loyalty program expires */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the customer */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loyalty program (e.g., Active, Inactive, Expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_programs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., Active, Inactive, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)
